en_title: With Pokémon in Fortnite Seemingly Off the Table, Palworld Looks Likely to Crossover Instead
cn_title: 宝可梦缺席，《幻兽帕鲁》或将联动《堡垒之夜》
subtitle: 宝可梦仍缺席

paragraphs.en: Steam hit Palworld looks likely to crossover with Fortnite in the future, while Pokémon seemingly remains off the table.
paragraphs.cn: Steam热门游戏《幻兽帕鲁》未来似乎很可能与《堡垒之夜》联动，而宝可梦看来依然不在考虑范围内。

paragraphs.en: Back in January, Pocketpair head of publishing and communications John "Bucky" Buckley openly suggested a crossover with Fortnite via a post on social media, hoping to catch the attention of Epic Games. "If you ever want to put Palworld in Fortnite just reach out hehe 😇," Bucky wrote — and it seems like Epic Games might have taken interest.
paragraphs.cn: 今年1月，Pocketpair发行与传播负责人John「Bucky」Buckley曾在社交媒体上公开提议与《堡垒之夜》联动，希望引起Epic Games注意。Bucky写道：「如果你们想把《幻兽帕鲁》放进《堡垒之夜》，尽管来联系，嘿嘿 😇。」如今看来，Epic Games或许真的产生了兴趣。

paragraphs.en: This week, Epic Games was spotted adding Palworld to Fortnite's in-game survey, which sometimes asks players to rate aspects of the game, or share details of other games they had played recently. It's also a tool that is sometimes used to gauge interest in upcoming crossovers, with titles popping up before crossover skins appear in-game.
paragraphs.cn: 本周，有人发现Epic Games已将《幻兽帕鲁》加入《堡垒之夜》的游戏内调查。这类调查有时会要求玩家评价游戏内容，或说明最近玩过哪些其他游戏；Epic Games也会借此评估玩家对未来联动的兴趣，一些作品往往会在联动皮肤上线前先出现在调查中。

paragraphs.en: Less than 24 hours after this, Bucky mysteriously tweeted to ask Palworld fans which Pal creature they would like to see get a skin one day — with the caveat that he did not mention Fortnite by name, and stated that his question was being asked "theoretically, hypothetically, conceptually, and spiritually," with "absolutely no promise of it being realized or coming to fruition ever."
paragraphs.cn: 不到24小时后，Bucky又神秘地发帖询问《幻兽帕鲁》玩家，希望哪只帕鲁有朝一日获得皮肤。不过，他并未点名《堡垒之夜》，还强调这个问题只是「理论上、假设上、概念上以及精神上」的讨论，「绝对不承诺它永远会实现或成为现实」。

paragraphs.en: Theoretically, hypothetically, conceptually, and spiritually…if, with absolutely no promise of it being realized or coming to fruition ever, but if…capital I and capital F…IF…any of the new Pals in 1.0 were to get a skin, which would it be and what would the skin be?
paragraphs.cn: 理论上、假设上、概念上以及精神上……假如——绝对不承诺它永远会实现或成为现实——但假如……大写的I和大写的F……IF（如果）……1.0版的任何新帕鲁能获得一款皮肤，你会选谁，又希望是什么皮肤？

paragraphs.en: Still, though, it's all interesting timing. Fortnite has of course teamed up with dozens of other games in the past for collaborations, including huge franchises such as Resident Evil, Street Fighter, God of War, and Halo. Indeed, rumors abound that Fortnite's next season will be fully gaming crossover-themed, with whispers from reliable Fortnite leakers that Sonic, Kingdom Hearts, and Persona are among those soon to be joining the party.
paragraphs.cn: 尽管如此，这个时机仍然耐人寻味。《堡垒之夜》过去已与数十款游戏合作，包括《生化危机》《街头霸王》《战神》和《光环》等大型系列。如今传言称，《堡垒之夜》下一赛季将完全围绕游戏联动展开；多名可靠爆料者还表示，索尼克、《王国之心》和《女神异闻录》等作品可能很快加入。

paragraphs.en: Could Palworld pop up too? It seems likely. Fortnite has recently leaned into creature collecting gameplay with the current season's hugely popular Sprites, which players have been enthusiastically capturing and trading, boosting the game's player numbers by a fair margin. Just this week, Fortnite also announced it would be soon highlighting player-made games that feature gameplay tied to its pet-like Sidekicks — which seem like another solid gameplay possibility for how Pals could show up.
paragraphs.cn: 《幻兽帕鲁》也会现身吗？可能性看来不低。《堡垒之夜》当前赛季凭借极受欢迎的精灵（Sprites）加大了生物收集玩法，玩家热衷于捕捉和交易它们，令游戏玩家数明显增长。本周，《堡垒之夜》还宣布将很快重点推荐结合宠物式伙伴（Sidekicks）玩法的玩家自制游戏，这似乎也为帕鲁登场提供了另一种可行方式。

paragraphs.en: And all of this comes as Fortnite continues to crossover with pretty much every gaming brand under the sun... other than Nintendo. Epic Games is understood to have explored the possibility of working with the Mario maker previously, during the game's explosive heyday when it secured Xbox and PlayStation mascots such as Kratos, Aloy and Master Chief as in-game skins. But Nintendo reportedly refused to play ball, uncertain about its characters appearing on rival consoles. Years later, and despite plenty of opportunities (a Super Mario Galaxy Movie crossover, anyone?) Nintendo and Pokémon remain absent — perhaps to Palworld's advantage.
paragraphs.cn: 与此同时，《堡垒之夜》几乎仍在与所有游戏品牌联动……唯独没有任天堂。据悉，在这款游戏人气爆发、成功引入奎托斯、埃洛伊和士官长等XBOX与PlayStation吉祥角色作为皮肤的鼎盛时期，Epic Games曾探讨过与马力欧创作者任天堂合作的可能。但据报道，任天堂担心自家角色出现在竞争对手主机上，因此拒绝合作。多年过去，即便联动机会不少（比如《超级马力欧银河大电影》联动？），任天堂与宝可梦仍未现身——这或许反而有利于《幻兽帕鲁》。

paragraphs.en: Palworld is currently seeing a resurgance on Steam following its big 1.0 update, though the question of whether it remains too uncomfortably close to Pokémon still remains. That update saw several Pal designs quietly modified so they no longer resemble Pokémon quite as closely . Asked for comment on the changes by IGN, developer Pocketpair did not respond. At the same time, yet another Pal was introduced — a giant whale — that some fans believe was closely inspired by yet another Pokémon .
paragraphs.cn: 大型1.0更新推出后，《幻兽帕鲁》目前在Steam上再度走红，不过它是否仍与宝可梦相似得令人不适，依然是个问题。该更新悄然修改了数只帕鲁的设计，让它们不再那么像宝可梦。IGN就这些改动寻求置评时，开发商Pocketpair没有回应。与此同时，游戏又加入了一只巨鲸帕鲁，一些粉丝认为它同样明显受到了另一只宝可梦的启发。

paragraphs.en: And of course, all of this comes amid the ongoing legal battle between The Pokémon Company and Pocketpair over the use of patents, which seemingly prompted the latter to make gameplay changes in order to nullify its claims. A judgment is expected later this year .
paragraphs.cn: 与此同时，宝可梦公司与Pocketpair仍在围绕专利使用进行诉讼，后者似乎已因此修改玩法，以使对方的主张失去依据。判决预计今年晚些时候作出。

paragraphs.en: Palworld's 1.0 launch landed earlier this month, finally bringing the game out of early access. Pocketpair said at the time that it would not raise the game's price beyond $29.99 as Palworld has "become a success beyond our wildest dreams." That statement likely reflects the fact that more than 40 million players had dipped their paws into Palworld since its early access launch.
paragraphs.cn: 《幻兽帕鲁》1.0版于本月早些时候上线，游戏终于结束抢先体验。Pocketpair当时表示，游戏价格不会超过29.99美元(约合人民币203元)，因为《幻兽帕鲁》已「取得了远超我们最疯狂想象的成功」。这番话可能是指，自抢先体验版推出以来，已有超过4,000万名（40 million）玩家踏入《幻兽帕鲁》的世界。

paragraphs.en: Our Palworld Interactive Map has been updated for 1.0, including Watchtower Locations , so you can make sure to uncover everything new. We’ve also got a guide to 1.0 Pal Breeding Combos and How to Get Hardwood , plus the Best 1.0 Mounts to Catch in Order , and the Fastest Flying Mounts in 1.0 .
paragraphs.cn: 我们的《幻兽帕鲁》互动地图已针对1.0版更新，包括瞭望塔位置，方便你找全所有新内容。我们还准备了1.0版帕鲁繁殖组合、硬木获取方法、1.0版最佳坐骑捕捉顺序，以及1.0版最快飞行坐骑等指南。

summary: Epic Games把《幻兽帕鲁》加入《堡垒之夜》游戏内调查后，Pocketpair高管又询问玩家希望哪些帕鲁获得皮肤，联动迹象随之增加；任天堂与宝可梦仍未加入《堡垒之夜》。
opus_summary: 《幻兽帕鲁》与《堡垒之夜》的联动迹象正在增加。Epic Games已把该作加入玩家调查，Pocketpair高管也公开征集皮肤人选；与此同时，任天堂与宝可梦依旧缺席。
